description_long: This object features a whimsical plant pot design with a bright green cylindrical pot emerging from a light blue, box-shaped base. The base is adorned with metallic bolts at each corner and has the words 'PIRANHA PLANT' in bold yellow letters on the front. From the pot grows a stylized, cartoonish plant with a thick, curved green stem, two jagged leaves, and a large red head with white spots and sharp white teeth, reminiscent of the Piranha Plant from the Mario franchise. The plant's head is expressive, with a wide open mouth and visible tongue, giving it a playful and animated appearance. The overall construction appears to be made of smooth, hard plastic with a glossy finish, and the object is compact enough to be placed on a tabletop or as a decorative feature in an urban setting. The design is eye-catching and playful, making it suitable for themed environments or as a statement piece.
description: A playful plant pot with a green cylindrical pot on a blue box base, featuring a cartoonish red and white Piranha Plant with jagged leaves and bold lettering. The design is smooth, glossy, and highly decorative.
description_view_0: Front view shows the 'PIRANHA PLANT' label, the green pot, and the full face of the red plant head with open mouth and teeth.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the plant's curved stem, jagged leaves, and the profile of the plant head with visible teeth and tongue.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the plant head, the green pot, and the plain blue box base without any lettering.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the plant's stem and leaves from the other profile, with the plant head turned away and no visible label.
attribute_placement_context: ideal for themed cafes, game rooms, or playful office spaces
attribute_decorative_pattern: bold lettering and cartoon plant motif
